subcodes.first_line: O ye verdant and flourishing leaves of the Blessed Tree! Verily! I read your letter, which expressed your spiritual attraction to the fragrances of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الورقات المخضرات المهتزات علی الشجره المبارکه انی تلوت کتابکن الناطق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
